slides.title: Market Overview
slides.body:
The private equity market is ripe for transformation.

Market Size:
• $13T+ in private equity AUM
• $2T+ annual transaction volume
• 10M+ private companies globally

Current Challenges:
• Illiquid investments
• Slow settlement (weeks)
• High minimums ($250K+)
• Limited secondary markets

slides.title: What is Equity Tokenization?
slides.body:
Converting ownership shares into digital tokens on blockchain.

How It Works:
• Issue equity as blockchain tokens
• Smart contracts automate transfers
• Real-time ownership tracking
• Programmable dividend payments
• Fractional ownership enabled

slides.title: Benefits
slides.col1:
For Issuers
• Access global investors
• Faster capital raise
• Automated compliance
• Reduced admin costs
slides.col2:
For Investors
• Lower minimums ($1K)
• Secondary market liquidity
• Instant transfer
• Transparent pricing

slides.title: Technical Architecture
slides.body:
DALP provides enterprise-grade tokenization infrastructure.

Token Standard:
• ERC-1400 compliant equity tokens
• Transfer restrictions built-in
• Multi-sig governance

Integration:
• Cap table systems
• Investor relations platforms
• Custody solutions

slides.title: DALP Dashboard
slides.body:
Complete platform for equity token issuance and management.

Features:
• Asset creation wizard
• Investor onboarding
• Transfer management
• Dividend distribution

slides.title: DALP Capabilities
slides.body:
Full lifecycle management for tokenized equity.

Issuance:
• Multi-tier share structures
• Voting rights encoding
• Dividend preferences

Management:
• Automated corporate actions
• Cap table automation
• Investor communications

slides.title: Use Cases
slides.item1:
Venture capital
Tokenize fund interests and ownership records with stronger governance, investor eligibility controls, and clearer servicing.
slides.item2:
Growth companies
Support broader shareholder access while keeping cap-table updates, approvals, and communications more structured.
slides.item3:
Real-estate equity
Represent ownership stakes in property vehicles with policy-led transfer controls and auditable investor onboarding.
slides.item4:
Private-equity funds
Improve distribution discipline, reporting clarity, and operational reuse across portfolio and fund structures.

slides.title: Case Study
slides.body:
Global PE firm tokenized $500M in fund interests.

Results:
• 40% faster capital raise
• 3x investor base expansion
• $2M annual admin savings
• Secondary market launched

slides.title: Regulatory Framework
slides.body:
Compliant with major securities regulations.

Key Regulations:
• SEC (Rule 144A, Reg D)
• EU (MiCA, Prospectus Regulation)
• MAS (SFA)
• FCA (FPO)

Features:
• Accredited investor verification
• KYC/AML integration
• Transfer restrictions

slides.title: Why SettleMint?
slides.body:
Trusted partner for equity tokenization.

Our Strengths:
• $1B+ assets tokenized
• Enterprise security (SOC 2)
• Global regulatory expertise
• Proven integration track record

slides.body:
